tournaments.title: Spring Cup 2026
tournaments.description:
1. Wager your way to the top with selected Platipus slot games!
2. Place qualifying bets on games like Lucky Cat and score points with every winning multiplier.
3. Make it in the Top 10 for the chance to win a share of 3,000 EUR with a first-place reward of 1,300 EUR.
